description_long: This object consists of a tightly packed cluster of round, deep blue spheres, each representing a ripe blueberry. The surfaces are matte with a subtle, natural bloom, giving them a slightly dusty appearance. The berries are uniform in size, with no visible stems or leaves attached, and are arranged in a compact, organic pile. Each sphere features a small, slightly indented calyx at one end, with a star-shaped pattern typical of blueberries. The overall form suggests freshness and plumpness, with the berries gently pressing against each other. The coloration is a consistent dark blue, with minor variations in shading due to lighting and surface texture.
description: A compact cluster of plump, matte dark blue blueberries with subtle bloom and star-shaped calyxes, arranged closely together.
description_view_0: A top-down view showing the clustered arrangement and the rounded tops of the blueberries.
description_view_1: A side view highlighting the vertical stacking and the close packing of the berries.
description_view_2: A horizontal view displaying the linear spread and the spherical shapes of the blueberries.
description_view_3: An angled side view emphasizing the depth and overlapping arrangement of the berries.
attribute_cluster_arrangement: The blueberries are arranged in a dense, organic cluster with individual berries touching and overlapping, forming a compact pile.
attribute_calyx_shape: Each berry has a small, star-shaped calyx with five shallow lobes, slightly indented at the blossom end.
